description: Absolute build-time budgets (milliseconds) per pipeline step, enforced by scripts/compare-build-performance.mjs. These are ceilings, not measured baselines: a step exceeding its budget is flagged as over-budget in the CI build-performance summary. Budgets carry deliberate headroom over observed local timings (which vary with network-bound steps hitting Sanity/YouTube and Puppeteer prerender). Raise a budget only when a step's cost grows for a justified reason.
